title: Test
html:
About me 

My name is Petra Pavlek, I am a yoga teacher, leader of systemic constellations and author of the Samadhi method of personal growth and work with trauma. My work connects body, breath and consciousness through experience.

I don't work with theory and analysis, but with a person who wants to feel themselves again.

I believe that change begins with a sense of security in one's own body. That's why the Samadhi approach doesn't ask us to fix something, but to return to what already knows how to breathe, calm down, allow ourselves and live.

Through years of working with people, I have learned that what everyone needs most is not technique, but a space where someone sees and hears them, where they can simply be, without trying to change them. In that space, the mind stops fighting, and the body just starts to let go of what it no longer needs.

If you feel like it's time to stop and find yourself again, I'm here.
